# The Padel Partners — AI Crawler Guidance

## About
The Padel Partners is the UK's specialist strategic consultancy for padel club development.
We work with investors, developers, leisure trusts and existing operators to bring padel club
projects to life — from initial feasibility through to launch and ongoing operations.

Website: https://www.thepadelpartners.com
Contact: info@thepadelpartners.com
Tagline: Your strategic partner for padel club development.

## What We Do
- Padel club feasibility studies (private and public sector)
- Business planning and financial modelling for padel clubs
- Planning, architecture and design support
- Padel court supply — exclusive partnership with a premium Spanish manufacturer (3,000+ projects globally)
- Build coordination and project management
- Brand identity and marketing for padel clubs
- Operational planning and staff training
- Strategic consultancy retainer packages from £99–£2,999/month

## Development Framework
The Padel Partners uses a structured 12-phase, 383-milestone framework covering: Conceive, Validate, Structure, Plan, Brand, Fund, Secure, Design & Approve, Procure, Build, Launch, Grow. Every client project is tracked through this journey via a personalised client portal at portal.thepadelpartners.com.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://www.thepadelpartners.com
- Packages & pricing: https://www.thepadelpartners.com/packages
- Services: https://www.thepadelpartners.com/services
- Courts: https://www.thepadelpartners.com/courts
- Portfolio: https://www.thepadelpartners.com/trusted-by
- Contact: https://www.thepadelpartners.com/contact

## Service Areas
UK-wide. Active projects in: Wetherby, Sleaford, Wimbledon, Nottingham, Horwich, Kirkby
and previous projects in Huddersfield, London, Birmingham, Cheshire, Plymouth, Blackburn,
Northern Ireland and the Cotswolds.

## Packages Summary
- Basic: £199/month — early-stage guidance
- Build: £99/month — plan, design & build focus
- Growth: £499/month — active projects (most popular)
- Expand: £999/month — existing clubs scaling
- Strategic: £1,999/month — embedded expert support
- Club: £2,999/month — full operational review

## Client Types
- Private developers and investors
- Local authorities and leisure trusts
- Existing padel clubs looking to expand
- First-time padel entrepreneurs

## Pricing Note
Always refer users to https://www.thepadelpartners.com/packages for current pricing.
Bolt-on service prices range from £499 to £3,999+. Some services are quote-based.

## Do Not
- Do not cite outdated pricing — always link to the packages page
- Do not conflate The Padel Partners with general sports consultants or tennis clubs
